items.badge_description: So, you're new around here? Congrats on your first brew! This one's for you.

Porters and Stouts are rich with both history and flavor. Roasty, dark, and delicious, these two styles helped start it all. That’s 245 different beers with the style of Porter or Stout. Try 5 more for Level 50!

items.badge_name: Beyond a Shadow of a Stout (Level 25)
items.badge_description: We all love Stouts, and now we have a dedicated badge to celebrate your dedication to these dark, top-fermented beer in multiple variations, like Oatmeal, Milk and more! Which one will you start with? That's 125 different beers with the style of Stout. Try 5 more for Level 26!

At first taste, dark ales can be overwhelming for even the most skilled of beer drinkers, but your will is weak and with time you will eventually turn to the dark side. That's 70 different beers with the style of Dark Ale, Belgian Strong Dark Ale, Lager - Dark, IPA - Black / Cascadian Dark Ale or IPA - Imperial / Double Black, Schwarzbier, or Mild - Dark. Try 5 more for Level 15!

Ahoy schwarz-buckler! Beware of the evil Black Beerd, as you sail the dark sea of suds matey. That's 25 different beers with style of Schwarzbier or Lager - Dark. Try 5 more for Level 6! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least That's 320 distinct venues!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 210 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 43!

A big juicy burger, some golden brown french fries, and a pint of your favorite brewskie. What more could you want? That's a beer at 10 different venus with the category of Burger Joint. Try 5 more for Level 3!

items.checkin_comment: IPA qui Donne envie de chier

items.badge_description: Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 95 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 20!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 30 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 7.

beer.beer_description: Malt, Hallerton Hops, German Lager Yeast

items.comment: 🤣🤣🤣 green monster, that brings back a few memories 🍺🍺🍺
Wasn’t anywhere as nice as the old monster, acttasted like one of my bad home brews

user.bio: I love a good bit of day drinking.

items.badge_description: Round and round the wheel goes! Which style you’ll be drinking, nobody knows! Your desire to explore different styles is inspiring. Keep it up! That's a check-in to at least 200 different styles. Try 5 more for Level 41!

Honey isn’t just for the bees. Whether it's the ancient fermented concoction that combines honey, water and a variety of spices to make Mead or its the traditional beer brewing process that adds honey as an additional ingredient, your love of honey is really showing. That's 5 different beers categorized as a Mead or Honey Beer. Try 5 more for Level 2!

At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 35 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 8! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

A big juicy burger, some golden brown french fries, and a pint of your favorite brewskie. What more could you want? That's a beer at 5 different venus with the category of Burger Joint. Try 5 more for Level 2!

beer.beer_description: Malt, Saaz Hops, European Lager Yeast
Malt, Hallerton Hops, German Lager Yeast
